description: User is reading the task instructions provided on the screen regarding booking a flight on the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: A dark screen displaying text instructions for a usability testing task.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to proceed to the Flight Centre website.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage as specified in the task.
frame_description: The URL bar updates to flightcentre.com.au and the page begins to load.
